# Checkbox — Designer Flexibility Test

> Gate 0 file — retroactively completed. All use-cases traced through
> checkbox.tokens.css and checkbox.css.

---

## Use-case 1: Full rebrand

A product switches its brand color from blue to purple. No component CSS changes.

```css
--color-brand-500: hsl(270, 80%, 50%);
/* + all other brand steps regenerated by palette engine */
```

Chain trace:
- `--color-brand-500` → `--checkbox-bg-checked` (declared in tokens.css as `var(--color-brand-500)`)
- `--checkbox-bg-checked` → `--_cb-bg` (set by `[aria-checked="true"]` / `:checked` selector)
- `--_cb-bg` → `.checkbox__box { background-color }` in checked state
- Border: `--checkbox-border-color-checked` → `var(--color-brand-500)` → same

✅ — no gaps. Rebrand propagates through the color token chain automatically.

---

## Use-case 2: Global shape reset (all components become sharp)

A brand wants zero border radius everywhere.

```css
--radius-sm: 0;
```

Chain trace:
- `--radius-sm` → `--checkbox-box-radius` (default: `var(--radius-sm)`)
- `--checkbox-box-radius` → `.checkbox__box { border-radius }`

✅ — box becomes sharp. Note: `border-radius: 9999px` produces a circular checkbox — this is a valid novelty variant for some brands (the radius token fully supports it).

---

## Use-case 3: Density override (make base feel larger)

A product wants the `base` size to feel like `medium`.

```css
--checkbox-box-size-base: var(--checkbox-box-size-medium);
--checkbox-label-font-size-base: var(--checkbox-label-font-size-medium);
--checkbox-gap-base: var(--checkbox-gap-medium);
```

Chain trace:
- `--checkbox-box-size-base` → `--_cb-box-size` (set by `[data-size="base"]` selector)
- `--_cb-box-size` → `.checkbox__box { width, height }`
- `--checkbox-label-font-size-base` → `--_cb-label-font-size` → `.checkbox__label { font-size }`

✅ — all three dimensions (box, label, gap) recompute from overridden tokens. No hardcoded values in the CSS selectors.

---

## Use-case 4: Dark mode (automatic, no extra rules)

System switches to `[data-theme="dark"]` on root.

Chain trace:
- `[data-theme="dark"]` → T1 overrides `--color-brand-500`, `--color-neutral-300`, etc.
- `--checkbox-bg-checked` → `--color-brand-500` (updated) → checked fill updates
- `--checkbox-border-color` → `--color-neutral-300` (updated in dark → lighter neutral step) → unchecked border updates
- Check icon: `--checkbox-check-color` → `--color-fixed-white` (FIXED — stays white in both themes) ✅

✅ — checkbox needs NO component-level `[data-theme="dark"]` block. T1 color system handles all semantic tokens.

---

## Use-case 5: Custom role (brand-specific "success" checkboxes)

A product wants checkboxes in a confirmation UI to use green instead of brand blue.

```css
.my-success-check {
  --checkbox-bg-checked:           var(--color-success-500);
  --checkbox-border-color-checked: var(--color-success-500);
  --checkbox-bg-checked-hover:     var(--color-success-600);
  --checkbox-bg-checked-pressed:   var(--color-success-700);
}
```

Chain trace:
- `--checkbox-bg-checked` overridden → `--_cb-bg` picks it up when checked → green fill ✅
- Hover/pressed: explicit overrides needed for hover/pressed steps (no auto-derivation from override)

⚠️ — Same documented limitation as toggle: hover/pressed shades don't auto-derive from a custom override. Three tokens must be set for a complete rebrand. This is acceptable — the override surface is clearly defined.

---

## Use-case 6: Circle checkbox (brand aesthetic variant)

Some brands use circular checkboxes for a modern feel.

```css
.my-pill-check {
  --checkbox-box-radius: 9999px;
}
```

Chain trace:
- `--checkbox-box-radius` → `.checkbox__box { border-radius: 9999px }` → circular box
- SVG check/dash: centered via `overflow: visible` + percentage positioning — stays centered ✅

✅ — full circle checkbox with check icon works. The SVG viewport is not clipped by the box border-radius.

---

## ✅ Flexibility review checklist (must all be checked before Gate 0 passes)

- [x] Rebrand use-case fully traced — no gaps
- [x] Shape reset use-case fully traced — circular checkbox variant confirmed working
- [x] Density override use-case fully traced — no hardcoded values found
- [x] Dark mode use-case fully traced — confirms NO component-level dark block needed
- [x] Custom role use-case fully traced — 3-token override required; documented limitation
- [x] Component-specific use-case added (circle checkbox) and traced — no gaps
- [x] Any gaps found: none blocking; hover/pressed custom role limitation documented
